creator: theis@gmx.at
text:
Am 12.06.2013 17:59, schrieb Sayetsky Anton:
> 2013/6/12 Sayetsky Anton <vsjcfm@gmail.com>:
>> I've attached to this email new patch that removes files/patch-pf.conf
>> & files/patch-bsd-ipfw.conf.
>> If you think that it's correct, please approve.
> Oops, previous wasn't correct. PORTREVISION must be bumped, isn't it?


The patch looks OK.

PORTREVISION must be bumped when the port shall be reinstalled.
As this is just a cleanup of files and doesn't change any installed 
files I don't think it is necessary.


Christoph
